mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_document_vector ( knowledge_document_id, session_id, document_type, document_content, chunk_index, chunk_content, embedding_vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at, is_active ) VALUES
( #{item.knowledgeDocumentId}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.documentType}, #{item.documentContent}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.chunkContent}, #{item.embeddingVector,typeHandler=com.example.agent.rag.handle.ListDoubleTypeHandler}, #{item.metadata,typeHandler=com.example.agent.rag.handle.FastJsonTypeHandler}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.isActive} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_document_vector WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_document_vector WHERE document_type = #{documentType} AND is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_document_vector WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_document_vector WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND document_type = #{documentType} AND is_active = true ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_document_vector WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_active = true
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(chunk_index), -1) FROM ai_document_vector WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND document_type = #{documentType} AND is_active = true
